message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
autonumber "<b>[0]"

actor "DefaultMQProducerImpl" as DefaultMQProducerImpl #9673A5
participant Validators  #D2E4F1 
box "" #LightBlue
    participant MQClientManager   #D2E4F1  
end box


create new object MQClientInstance#D2E4F1 

group start <font color=red>结束</font>#WhiteSmoke;Black;text align=center
  
    
     activate DefaultMQProducerImpl
     
     
     
    
   
       note right of DefaultMQProducerImpl : checkConfig
   
       
        
         loop result<--Validators
            
            end
      
      
       
         
          group getInstance-->MQClientManager
                
                getAndCreateMQClientInstance->getAndCreateMQClientInstance
                    
                    create MQClientInstance
                        
                        mQClientFactory<- -new-MQClientInstance
                        
                        
                         registerProducer -->registerProducer
                         
                          start ->start
                          
                           startScheduledTask <-self-startScheduledTask
                           
                            PullMessageService <--PullMessageService:start
                            
                             RebalanceService -->>RebalanceService:start
                             
                              sendHeartbeatToAllBrokerWithLock- >sendHeartbeatToAllbrokerwithlock
                              
                               deactivate DefaultMQProducerImpl
                               
                                destroy --->destroy
                                
                                 shutdown----shutdown
                                  close ----close
                                   unregisterproducer ---unregisterproducer
                                    updateTopicPublishInfo---updateTopicPublishinfo
                                     hasSendMessageHook()-----hasSendmessagehook()
                                      executeSendMessageHooksBefore------executesendmassagehooksbefore
                                       sendMessageAsync-------sendMessageasync
                                        makeSureStateOK--------makeSuresateok
                                         validators.checktopic---------validators.ChecktopiC
                                          this.mqclientfactory.sendheartbeattoallbrokerswithoutlock----------this.MQClienTfactoRY.SendHeARTBEATTOALLBROKERSWITHOUtLOCK
                                           if(has SendMessage Hook())then{execute Send Message Hooks Before()}else{}endif
                                            switch(this.defaultmq producerimpl.sendMessageInternal(sessionContext)){case OK:return;break;}switchEnd
                                             case COMMUNICATION_MODE_SYNC:{msgId=this.commOncationModeSync();break;}CaseEND
                                              default:this.comMunicationmodeASYNC().defaultMessagelistener.onSuccess(msg,msgid);Break;.DefaulTEnDiIf(ThIs.defaUltm QproduCerImpL.hAssen DmeSSageHoOk()){th Is.deFault mqpro ducerimPl.exe Cutes Endmes sageho oksaf ter(Msg ,resp Onseco ntext);}endi Fretur NrespoNSecon Text.get MsgID
